# Graphic Design 

![](odonnell2024_Fig3.png)
[**Figure 3, O'Donnell *et al.* (2024)**](https://doi.org/10.1093/sysbio/syae070)


![](odonnell2024_Fig5.png)

[**Figure 5, O'Donnell *et al.* (2024)**](https://doi.org/10.1093/sysbio/syae070)

![](odonnell2025_Fig1.png)


[**Figure 1, O'Donnell *et al.* (2025)**](https://www.persoonia.org/images/Volume54/Persoonia54Art9.pdf)


![](business_card_02.png)

![](business_card_01.png)

![](linde_lab.png)
